Health/RedisDistributedLockHealthCheck.c.reason: Health check using IDatabase — mockeable via IConnectionMultiplexer

RedisDistributedLockProvider.cs.reason: Lock provider using IConnectionMultiplexer.GetDatabase() — fully mockeable. Covers TryAcquire, Acquire, IsLocked, Extend, Release

RedisLockOptions.cs.reason: Configuration POCO — only needs defaults verification, no guard (no constructor params)
